project_description: Help us optimize content display across our website's various subdomains

organization.name: BEYOND Bollywood
organization.description: At BEYOND Bollywood we stand for advancing the concepts of cultural diversity, equality, respect and community inclusion. Through the power of Bollywood dance with its music, theatre and films, we join hands with different dance practitioners to connect and develop sustainable partnerships with numerous community organizations, Universities, schools and corporates to organize impact projects with the aim of raising public awareness on finding value in people who are undermined and provide opportunity for those who are often overlooked in Hong Kong. We believe that change begins within, through different community engagement initiatives, we do hope to build a bridge for dance practitioners who use their own skills, talents and influence to make an impact in whatever causes they stand for. We dedicate to using movement artistry to elevate the educational and social impact of dance and ultimately all move to a more benevolent community in the city. 創立於2015年的慈善團體,透過印度舞蹈的演出、工作坊、音樂舞蹈劇、電影、舞蹈教育和以舞蹈介入社會的實驗,並以多元文化、平等、尊重和包容的理念,深化社區及跨地域的文化交流平台。

what_we_need: Attend a 30-minute orientation meeting to learn about our website architecture and goals
Enhance website performance and navigation through structural improvements
Create and update web pages with fresh content and modern features
Upload and organize archived content using provided materials
Cantonese language skills preferred for effective team communication
project_details.background: We are in a new stage, so we need to fully update our website, including our subdomain, to make sure all the information matches our new situation. This update will make our website more useful and easier to use, helping us keep our community well-informed and involved.
project_details.what_we_have: We have an existing Wix website (beyondbollywood.org) and need your help in redesigning and adding new pages to it. Website edit access and content (text and images) will be provided.
project_details.why_important: Updating our website helps BEYOND Bollywood's mission by making sure our online information matches what we do. This will help us talk better with our audience, get more people involved in our events, and build stronger community connections. This supports our goal to celebrate diversity and inclusion.

special_program.name: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program
special_program.description: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program aims to encourage skilled volunteers to support Swire Trust NGO partners in education, marine conservation, and arts. From now until 2025, 10 outstanding volunteers will be selected annually as the 'Swire Trust Go-Givers of the Year' with special and empowering rewards. 40 volunteers who contribute the highest number of hours annually will also be recognised!
